FeatureName: Stable renaming of surviving day photos
Description: Rename every surviving accepted photo in a day folder so files from the same cluster and burst group appear together and follow the `cNNN_bNNN_NNN.ext` convention.

Stories.StoryDescription: Order surviving photos by cluster ID, burst group ID, capture time, and lexical path so the generated names are deterministic.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Rename ordering is deterministic and produces stable per-burst sequence numbers.

Stories.StoryDescription: Rename surviving day-root photos with a two-phase temporary rename so no file is overwritten during normalization.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Survivors are renamed safely to `cNNN_bNNN_NNN.ext` while preserving their original extension.

Stories.StoryDescription: Ensure already-normalized files are left unchanged on rerun when their generated target name matches the current filename.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Full pipeline reruns complete without unnecessary renames or collisions and automated tests cover the rerun path.
